text:
The two hyperlinks in /usr/src/release/picobsd/README.html point to invalid locations. Fix: bash-2.04# diff README.html README.html.new 10c10 <

Please start from here for general --- >

Please start from here for general 12c12 < here for detailed instructions on how to --- > here for detailed instructions on how to bash-2.04# How-To-Repeat: Attempt to examine the two links in /usr/src/release/picobsd/README.html within a web browser (i.e. netscape)
